signatures: copy(footprintUuid: string, libraryUuid: string, targetLibraryUuid: string, targetClassification?: ILIB_ClassificationIndex | Array<string>, newFootprintName?: string): Promise<string | undefined>
returnSummary:
Promise<string \| undefined>

目标库内新封装的 UUID

params.name: libraryUuid
params.description: 库 UUID，可以使用 LIB\_LibrariesList 内的接口获取

params.name: newFootprintName
params.description: _（可选）_ 新封装名称，如若目标库内存在重名封装将导致复制失败
